DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 3959(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO PLEAD A PRIOR DEMAND FOR ARBITRATION UNDER THE AGREEMENT AND A REFUSAL TO DO SO CCP SECTION 1281.2. FURTHER, IT APPEARS THAT NEITHER OF THE FORUMS IN WHICH THE PARTIES CONSENTED TO ARBITRATE THEIR DISPUTES UNDER THE CARDHOLDER AGREEMENT ARE AVAILABLE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/CWW)(302/CWW) JUDGE CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD. REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR # 5797

MASTER CALENDAR COURT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Continued To Nov-12-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Sep-01-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT MICHELLE A. RODRIGUEZ'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - denied. Defendant has failed to plead a prior demand for arbitration under the agreement and a refusal to do so. C.C.P. section 1281.2. Further, it appears that neither of the forums in which the parties consented to arbitrate their disputes under the cardholder agreement are AVAILABLE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
